title: Create: mechanical warfare
description: Around 70 create themed mods that all fit together.
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1356770316075929641?label=Join%20us&logo=discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/FmWeqveQGU)


Create: mechanical warefare is a war themed modpack based around create, this forge 1.20.1 modpack is packed with create mods, optimization mods and technology/weapon mods! This modpack has been hand selected by me to make sure everybody has an enjoyable experience! :3 hope you enjoy!

Also you will need to put these two mods into your mod folder:

[Cosmetic armor reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked/download/4600191)

[Simple shops](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-shops/download/4716851)
